description: Hi! A professional website can help you attract more clients and present your services in a much clearer way — without high costs. That’s exactly what I help businesses with. Want me to explain briefly how it could work for you?

layoutDescription: Split hero: asymmetric photo column (55–60%) vs. typographic column; headline flush left, phone + CTA stacked; optional thin vertical rule or color band separating columns.
antiPatterns: Avoid generic 3-column icon cards. Copy must be specific to this Facebook page.
photoInventory: You will receive 7 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
